name: Reinforce
text: Look at the top 5 cards of your Main Deck. You may banish a unit from among them, then play it, reducing its cost by :rb_energy_5:. Recycle the remaining cards.
text_rich: Look at the top 5 cards of your Main Deck. You may banish a unit from among them, then play it, reducing its cost by :rb_energy_5:. Recycle the remaining cards.
accessibility_text: Riftbound Spell: Reinforce. Look at the top 5 cards of your Main Deck. You may banish a unit from among them, then play it, reducing its cost by [5]. Recycle the remaining cards.

legality.notes: No specific Standard Constructed ban found in official first-bans announcement as of 2026-03-30.

source.notes: Imported from official card-gallery API feed.
